overall.description: Aerial drone footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, capturing a foggy night in Night City. The camera glides smoothly over multi-level highway interchanges between towering skyscrapers illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements and the distinctive red warning lights of a central corporate tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of cyberpunk highway interchange

agents.ego_description: piloting aerial camera over the cityscape, observing the neon-lit skyline and sparse traffic on the highways below

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in bright vertical neon advertisements with yellow and red signage
multi-level highway junction with visible vehicle lights moving along the roads
dominant skyscraper with distinctive horizontal red illuminated bands and warning lights near the summit
dark glass skyscraper with scattered illuminated windows rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial approach over a foggy cyberpunk city at night. Neon billboards glow on the left while a massive red-lit corporate tower dominates the center distance. Below, the highway interchange is visible with sparse traffic moving along the asphalt roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial highway interchange with air traffic

events.description: flying vehicle enters frame from the right, moving horizontally across the cityscape

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady aerial observation as a flying car passes through the frame

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car moving rapidly from right to left across the frame at high altitude

entered.detail: sleek dark aerodyne with illuminated windows and anti-collision lights

segments.scene_description: A futuristic flying car suddenly enters from the right, traversing the frame horizontally past the red-lit tower. The vehicle's running lights streak across the foggy night as it moves toward the left, adding dynamic motion to the otherwise steady aerial glide.

scene_state.functional_zone: close aerial approach to corporate tower district

events.description: flying vehicle exits frame to the left, leaving the airspace clear

agents.ego_description: gliding past the red-lit corporate tower while maintaining altitude, revealing more of the downtown skyline ahead

segments.scene_description: After the flying vehicle exits, the camera continues its forward drift, bringing the massive red-lit corporate tower prominently into the left foreground. The highway interchange remains visible below while the distant skyline becomes clearer through the fog, with the glass residential tower receding into the right background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a foggy cyberpunk cityscape that shifts from a wide approach toward a focused perspective of a corporate monolith. It begins with a steady drift over a highway interchange, where neon billboards glow against the haze and a massive red-lit tower looms in the distance. As the camera advances, a futuristic flying car suddenly streaks horizontally across the frame, its running lights cutting through the fog before it disappears to the left. The scene then shifts as the forward momentum brings the red-lit corporate tower prominently into the left foreground, while the distant skyline and a glass residential tower gradually recede into the right background.
